title: ENDELEMENT
text: ENDELEMENT Ends an XML element by adding the closing tag. ENDELEMENT() Return Values Values returned: 0 Success. –1 Failure. Called in an illegal sequence. Description A call to the ENDELEMENT operation is legal only after an invocation of STARTELEMENT (to immediately end the element just started), CHARACTERS , ENDELEMENT (to close both the nested and the parent element) or DOCCOMMENT . If the defined element is empty or has no text, it is written as <ELEMENT/> . Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
